productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Trying White Dress
description: Style NoteLight and summery to suit the season, this dress from little miss will make your little girl look sweet and keep her sweat-free. The soft fabric is as comfy as it is prettyProduct DetailsWhite sleeveless dress with broad straps, has a square neck, short buttoned placket, gathered from the yoke down, two patch pockets on the sides, graphic print on the front and stitch detailingMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
